name: JiaXing Gas Group Co., Ltd.
summary: JiaXing Gas Group Co., Ltd. operates as a piped natural gas (PNG) operator in the People's Republic of China. The company sells PNG, liquefied natural gas (LNG), and liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) to residential and non-residential users; provides construction and installation services for gas pipeline network and gas facilities to property developers and owners, or occupants of residential and non-residential properties; and distributes and sells gas pipes and equipment. It also provides gas technology consulting services; constructs and operates new energy facilities, as well as LNG storage and transportation station; transports LNG and compressed natural gas; sells vapour and construction materials; and leases properties. The company serves customers in the Jiaxing port and urban areas. JiaXing Gas Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Jiaxing, the People's Republic of China.
